errors.stashFilesEmpty: Select at least one file to stash.
errors.discardFilesEmpty: Select at least one file to discard.

discardDialog.title: Discard Changes
discardDialog.description: Discard changes for {count} selected files? This cannot be undone.
discardDialog.warning: Tracked changes are restored to HEAD. Newly added files are removed.

push.missingOriginMessage: This repository does not have an origin remote. Configure origin before pushing.
push.currentBranchUnavailableMessage: The current branch could not be determined, so push is unavailable.
push.createBranchDescription: {branch} does not have an upstream branch. Create {remote}/{branch} and push to it?
push.createBranchAfterCommitDescription: {branch} does not have an upstream branch. Create {remote}/{branch} after committing and push to it?

branchDialog.title: Create Branch
branchDialog.switchAfterCreate: Switch to the new branch after creating it

branchDelete.title: Delete Branch
branchDelete.description: This action will delete {branch}. Type the full branch name below to confirm.
branchDelete.forceOption: Force delete even if the branch is not fully merged
branchDelete.nameMismatch: The branch name does not match.

sidebar.openRepositoryHint: Open a Git repository from the folder picker.
sidebar.emptyState: Select a repository from Open in the top-left.

history.loadingBody: The list updates as chunks arrive.
history.emptyBody: Open a repository or create the first commit.
history.filteredEmptyTitle: No commits match the current search.
history.filteredEmptyBody: Try a different keyword or clear the search box.

details.loadingBody: Commit metadata and patch are being loaded.
details.emptyTitle: Select a commit to inspect details.
details.emptyBody: The lower panel shows metadata and file changes for the selected commit.
details.author: Author
details.filesEmpty: No changed files in this commit.
details.diffEmpty: No patch available for this commit.

commit.filesCaption: Files currently changed in the working tree.
commit.stashCaption: Choose files to stash and optionally name the stash.
commit.discardCaption: Choose files to revert from the working tree and index.
commit.discardWarning: Selected changes will be removed from the working tree. Newly added files are deleted.
